welcome:
Welcome to CrisisBridge Bot! 🌍

We deliver daily multilingual humanitarian bulletins for civilians affected by the Middle East crisis.

Use /help to see available commands.
help:
📋 Available commands:

/latest — Get the latest crisis bulletin
/shelter [location] — Find nearest shelters with capacity
/language [code] — Set your preferred language
  Codes: en, ar, fa, dar, zh, tr
/about — About this project
/help — Show this help message
latest_no_data: No bulletins available at the moment. Check back soon.
shelter_no_results: No shelter data available for this location yet. We're working on expanding coverage.
language_invalid: ❌ Unsupported language code. Available: en, ar, fa, dar, zh, tr
about:
CrisisBridge is a volunteer-led open-source project that translates UN humanitarian reports into 9 languages and delivers them via Telegram.

🔗 GitHub: github.com/CuiweiG/openclaw-humanitarian
📧 Contact: aid@agentmail.to

We do not accept donations. Please support ICRC, UNHCR, or MSF directly.
disclaimer: ⚠️ This information is AI-generated from official UN sources. Always verify with local authorities for critical decisions.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
share_prompt: 📢 Share this bulletin with anyone who might need it.
